title: Instruction Sequencing and Execution Flow
description: A flowchart depicting the sequential steps a CPU follows to fetch, decode, and execute a machine instruction, highlighting the role of the Program Counter (PC) and Instruction Register (IR).
relationships: PC holds address of next instruction -> MAR loads address from PC -> Memory fetches instruction at that address -> MDR/IR holds the fetched instruction -> Control Unit decodes instruction -> Control Unit sends signals to ALU/Registers to execute operation -> PC is updated to point to next instruction
